result: admin-only POST /agents creates the Clerk user directly; zero SignUp components anywhere in either app
only getInvitationList (read) found, no createInvitation call in this codebase
bare email+password form, no forgot-password/magic-link/signup affordance
uses Clerk's stock <SignIn routing="hash"/> with no suppressing props; whether it shows forgot-password/signup depends on Clerk Dashboard config, not visible in repo
Clerk's own SecureStore-backed session cache (via tokenCache) is separate from the app's 55-min carry_jwt cache used only by the background-sync task; foreground sign-in state survives offline
